task: Search for in-person, full-time jobs within 10 miles of ZIP code 14810 that allow Quick Apply.
graderReasoning: The agent completed the search on ZipRecruiter and applied the required constraints. Evidence shows the final results page URL included radius=10, refine_by_employment=employment_type:full_time, refine_by_location_type=no_remote (on-site/in-person), and refine_by_apply_type=has_zipapply. The final page displayed 2 matching jobs, both marked Quick apply: Inside Sales Associate at Astrapouch in Middlesex, NY and RV Dealership Sales Associate at Meyer's RV & Marine in Bath, NY. This satisfies the task to search for in-person, full-time jobs within 10 miles of ZIP 14810 that allow Quick Apply.
